meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: At Civic Awareness, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you use our website.

cards.title: Information We Collect
cards.text: We may collect non-personal information such as browser type, device information, pages visited, and general usage statistics to improve the performance and user experience of our website.

cards.title: Cookies & Analytics
cards.text: Our website may use cookies and analytics services to understand visitor behavior, improve content, and provide a better browsing experience. You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings.

cards.title: How We Use Information
cards.text: Any information collected is used to maintain, improve, and secure our website. We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties.

cards.title: Third-Party Services
cards.text: Our website may use trusted third-party services such as Google Analytics and Google AdSense. These services may collect information according to their own privacy policies to provide analytics and personalized advertisements.

footer.title: Policy Updates
footer.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. Continued use of the website indicates your acceptance of the updated policy.
